commit_scope: Add the phonemic energetic symbol-space lens to trace-symbol-spaces.form as a source-attributed, executable observation lens inspired by Alphabet Unlocked / The Abazith.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.summary: trace-symbol-spaces.form now includes a phonemic-energetic symbol space for attributed sound-symbol hypotheses. The lens keeps raw identity primary, reads phoneme cells, vowel modifiers, glyph sets, source-attributed sound-meaning claims, and observation traces, and routes observe_sound_symbol_hypothesis through symbol_space_for(goal). A new tightness and closure recipe name how an external lens enters through expression, choice, source attribution, observed resonance, residual, surprise, and circulation. Focused tests prove the declaration and gap recipe are present. The native trace-symbol proof still returns true and the trace-index bridge still returns the five current-breath efficacy-probe recipes. The branch was rebased onto origin/main; the append-only executor log conflict was resolved by keeping the upstream router proof record and this task's proof record. Local PR guard returned ready_for_push=True and strict PR follow-through found no stale Codex PRs.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
